key_structures.name: AppEvent
key_structures.purpose: Unified async event type for TUI loop

key_structures.name: Mode
key_structures.purpose: Interaction mode determining active keybindings and overlays

patterns_discovered.description: AppEvent enum consolidates keyboard input, terminal resize, timer ticks, filesystem changes, and log lines into single tokio::sync::mpsc stream
patterns_discovered.significance: Enables non-blocking event loop with background tasks

patterns_discovered.description: VecDeque<String> for log_buf (capacity 200) and VecDeque<u8> for throughput (8 samples) with automatic eviction
patterns_discovered.significance: Memory-bounded circular buffers prevent unbounded growth while maintaining recent history

patterns_discovered.description: KanbanColumn tracks optional wip_limit and provides is_at_wip_limit() and wip_saturation() methods
patterns_discovered.significance: Enables WIP limit alerts and visual indicators (header turns red at saturation)

patterns_discovered.description: collect_card_views() and collect_state_cards() reuse patterns from list.rs for card collection
patterns_discovered.significance: Maintains consistency across CLI subcommands (list vs. ui)

patterns_discovered.description: Card collection scans both root-level and team-* prefixed directories for .bop/.jobcard bundles
patterns_discovered.significance: Supports multi-team card organization without central registry

patterns_discovered.description: read_wip_limit() checks project config first (.bop/config.json), then global config
patterns_discovered.significance: Allows per-project and global defaults for WIP limits

gotchas_discovered.description: refresh_columns() loops to preserve old selection but doesn't actually restore it — caller must handle this
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Code comment indicates caller responsibility; next phase must implement proper selection handoff during refresh

gotchas_discovered.description: collapsed field is set once at KanbanColumn::new() but never updated when cards are added/removed
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Future event handlers must call KanbanColumn::refresh() or recalculate collapsed state after filesystem changes

gotchas_discovered.description: ListState defaults to no selection; manual select(Some(0)) required if cards non-empty
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Implemented correctly in KanbanColumn::new(), but refresh_columns() does not reinitialize selections

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: No synchronization between App.mode and UI state
gotchas_discovered.description: Switching modes (Normal → Filter → ActionPopup) is stateless; filter query and popup context not tied together
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Event handlers must maintain invariants (e.g., Filter mode without filter query should revert to Normal)

code_quality.comments: Comprehensive doc comments on all public items
code_quality.organization: Clear separation: events → modes → data structures → helpers → tests
code_quality.error_handling: anyhow::Result used throughout; graceful fallbacks for missing config/directories

integration.existing_patterns: Mirrors list.rs card collection; reuses CardView and Meta types

recommendations.item: Implement event handler skeleton in main loop to consume AppEvent variants and dispatch to mode handlers
recommendations.rationale: App and AppEvent structures are now ready; next phase (subtask-1-3) must implement the event-to-state mutation machinery

recommendations.item: Add AppState update methods (move_card_between_states, toggle_mode, update_log_tail) before rendering phase
recommendations.rationale: Render layer will be read-only; mutation layer must be complete before ratatui widgets consume this data

recommendations.item: Implement selection state handoff during refresh_columns() to prevent focus loss on filesystem changes
recommendations.rationale: Current stub only preserves old column references; must track selected card ID and restore selection in new data

recommendations.item: Add refresh() method to KanbanColumn to recalculate collapsed state and re-sort cards without rebuilding
recommendations.rationale: Filesystem changes should update card lists without full App::new() re-scan

recommendations.item: Consider Mode::ActionPopup context struct to store popup-specific state (selected action index, confirmation state)
recommendations.rationale: Current Mode enum is stateless; action popup overlay will need to track which action user is hovering over
